welcome.lead: {n}+ accessible components, live reactive theming, dark mode with custom surfaces and native i18n. Tailwind CSS v4. TypeScript first. No lock‑in.
welcome.featuresTitle: Everything you need, nothing in the way.
welcome.featuresSubtitle: Built for designers and developers who want to ship fast without sacrificing quality or a11y.
welcome.nextStepsBody: Configure the provider, explore components or customize theming.
welcome.catalogSubtitle: Forms, feedback, layout, navigation, calendar, table… all share the same API and design tokens.
welcome.finalCtaBody: Open source, MIT, no lock-in. Just Vue 3 + Tailwind v4 + your own creativity.

seo.title: Mood UI — The most beautiful Vue and Nuxt component library
seo.description: The most beautiful open source Vue and Nuxt component library with {n}+ accessible components, Tailwind CSS v4, TypeScript, dark mode, WAI-ARIA accessibility and native i18n. MIT.

theming.title: Reactive theming
theming.text: Change color, radius, size, halo and light/dark mode live. Every component reacts instantly.

i18n.title: Built-in i18n
i18n.text: Spanish and English included. Switch language globally with useLocale().set("en").

darkMode.title: Dark mode + surfaces
darkMode.text: 6 dark surface presets (navy, zinc, charcoal…) or tune all 14 semantic tokens yourself.

a11y.title: WAI-ARIA accessible
a11y.text: Roles, focus rings, keyboard navigation and screen readers covered out of the box.

ts.title: Tree-shakeable · TS first
ts.text: Import only what you use. Full types, IntelliSense autocomplete, ESM + CJS.

tailwind.title: Tailwind v4 native
tailwind.text: CSS vars, design tokens and \@theme inline. Override from your tailwind.config - no hacks.
